titleStmt.title: SII 24.118: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 118. (A.R. No. 438 of 1954-55.) II PRĀKĀRA, INNER WALL OF THE SILVER PALANQUIN ROOM.

summary.p: Damaged. Commences with the praśasti Pūmālai miḍaindu etc. Records the sale of one vēli of land by the Śrīvaishṇavas of the temple to Nambi Nilaiyaṉ Tiruchchiṟṟambalamuḍaiyāṉ alias Muḍikoṇḍachōḻa-mūvēndavēḷār of Poṟkalakkuḍi in Marugal-nāḍu in Gēyamāṇikka-vaḷanāḍu, who probably donated the same to the temple at the instance of Rājavichchādira Brahmamārāyar, the Śrīkāryam, of the temple, for a flower garden.
The record is dated in the 12th year of the king's reign, Siṁha, ba. 8, Thursday, Kārttikai (Kṛittikā), which corresponds to 1129 A.D., August, 8, f.d.t. ·33. f.d.n. ·69.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
—... svasti śrī . pūmālai miṭaintu pon mālai tikaḻa pāmālai mali [ n=ta pa] rumaṇit tiraḷa puyattiru nilamaṭantai yoṭu jayamakaḷiruppak kanavarai mārvan tanatenap peṟṟu
t tirumakaḷorutani Iruppatta coṟṟiṟam puṇarnta kaṟpinaḷāki viruppo ttiruppat ticaitoṟum tikiratiyo kol naṭappa
akilapuvanamuḻutum kavippator putumatipol veṇkuṭai mimicai niṟpa karuṅkali vanpilattiṭaik kiṭappa kulattiṭait teluṅka viman vilaṅkala
micai yeṟavum kaliṅka pūmiyai kaṉaleri parukavum paruvattu vempaṭai tāṅki veṅkai maṇṭalat
meymaiyum yukam �
pāttivar cūṭa mayiṟ cūṭa mannuyiṟkellām Innuyiṟtāy
ṅkaḷippa maṉuneṟi vaḷarttu tan koyiṟ koṟṟa vāiṟ puṟattu maṇināvoṭuṅka muracukaḷ muḻaṅka vijayamum
loṅka vāḻi Āḻi kātta tirumaṇi ṟṟeṭṭeḻutu ṟaimunne mannavar cumantu ti
poṟ kuvaiyāl tan kulanāyakan tā campon palañcūḻa tirumāḷikaiyum kopuravācalum kūṭi vum
koṇṭa Oḷiviḷaṅku nemik kulavarai Utaiyakkuṟṟa mo pacum pon meyntu palavaḷar pīṭamum vicumpoḷi taḻaippa
lan taḻaippa Imaiyavar kaḷippa periya tirunāḷ Uyar puraṭṭāti Uttiraṭṭātiyil Ampalam niṟainta Aṟputa
ḻuntaruḷuvatāku tirutterkoyil cempon meyntu paruttiraḷ muttin payil vaṭam parappi niṟaimaṇi māḷikai neṭum
tu camaittaruḷi paiyppoṟ kuḻitta parikala mutalāy cempoṟ kaṟpakattoṭu paric cinnamum Aḷavillātana Oḷipeṟac camaittu pattara
m peṟṟa Ātittavārattu tiruvaḷar matiyum tirayotaśippakkattu Innaṉa palavum Initu camaittaruḷi tan Orukuṭai niḻaltala muḻutum taḻaippa
curam pukac ceralar kaṭal puka vaḻitaru ciṅkaḷar Añci neñcilamara kaṅkar tiṟaiyiṭa kannaṭar venniṭak koṅkarotuṅkak koṅkaṇar cāya maṟṟetticaiy mannarum ta
ntamak karaṇenat tirumalarc cevaṭi Urimaiyiliṟaiñci terivaiyar tilatam tiyāka patākai purikuḻal maṭappiṭi punita kuṇavanitai tiripuvanamuḻutuṭai yāḷivan tiru
tai muḻutuṭaiyāḷena Uṭaniruppa neṭumālākattut tirumakaḷiruntena mātarī maṭamayil pūtalattaruntuti Aruṉiya kaṟpputtaraṇi muḻutuṭaiyāḷivan tirumaṇi mārva
niruppa cempon vīrasiṅhāsanattu tiripuvanamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum vīṟṟirun taruḷiya kopparakecaripanmarāṉa tiripuvaṉacakkaravattikaḷ śrīvikkiramacoḻa devaṟku yāṇṭu
panniraṇṭāvatu Aparapakṣattu siṅhanāyaṟṟu kārttikaiyum Aṣṭamiyum viyāḻak kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa nāḷ nilavilai Āvaṇam tiruvaraṅkattāḻvārkku [śrīkāriya]
ñceykiṟa rājaviccātira brahmaādhirāyar Evaṟpaṭi civaiyṇava kaṇkāṇi ceyvār kaḷil parakecari Āṇṭānum tiruviṇṇakar nampiyum kantāṭait tiruvaraṅka nārāya
m perumpaṟṟappuliyūr Arumāridāsarum Arumārittirukkaṇṭarum Aṇiyaraṅka dāsarum parakecari ciykārimāṟa nampiyum Iṭavai nārāyaṇa nampiyum Irāyūrp paḷḷikoṇṭāṉ ppaṭṭaṉu
nampiyum śrīvvaiyiṣṇavavāriyaril tirumaṅkai yāḻvānum ciy caṭāya dāsarum periyakoyilamutu tiruvāypāṭi dāsarum cakkarapāṇi na
mpiyum tirumālcolaidāsarum śrī paṇṭāravāriyam pāratāyan cirāman Ārāva mutāna Arumāri nampiyum Āritan puṇṭarikan Ārāvamutāṉa ci puṇṭarīka nampiyum pāratāyan ciri
ḷaṅko geruṭavākananum pārataāyan tiruveṅkaṭavan ciṅkamum Āritan cirākavan ciykārimāranum koyil kaṇakku tiruvaraṅkap piriyaṉum Uḷḷiṭṭa Āḻvār kanmi
kaḷom keyamāṇikkavaḷanāṭṭu marukanāṭṭu poṟkalakkuṭi poṟkalakkuṭiyānāna nampinilaiyan tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyānāna muṭikoṇṭacoḻa mu
ventaveḷārkku Ittiruppatiyil Irukkum śrī vayiṣṇavaril vaṭamaturaip piṟan=tānampiyum Ivan tampi tiruvāli Āḻvānum
vānam centāmaraik kaṇṇar tirunan=tavānattu Icain=ta kiḻpāṟkkellai koyil tirunantavānam Ulakuṭaiyāṉ melaippiḷḷai
Āka Āṇṭuvarai ye ṅka kā muṭpaṭa
vārākavum ceyyum Iṭattil Ikkantāṭai vaṭamaturaippiṟāntaka
cattārume ceyyak kaṭavāṟākavum Innilattukkum puncey varicai
yak kaṭavārallātārākavum Innilamanupavittu Ippaṭi kallil veṭṭi
kuṭi poṟkalakkuṭiyānāna nampi nilaiyan tirucciṟṟa
ṟku Innilam veliyum viṟṟuk kuṭuttom Aḻakiya maṇa
Ivai koyiṟ kaṇakku tiruvaraṅ kappiriyan neḻuttu Ippaṭi
sayijñaiyātanamai(yātanamai)kku śrī parācara paṭṭanneḻu
laidāsanneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Iṭavai nārāyaṇanampi Eḻuttu
perumpaṟṟappuliyūr cakkarapāṇi nampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkut ti
ḷḷi neḻuttu Ippaṭikku Aṇiyaraṅkadāsaneḻu
Ivai ṅkaiyāḷi nampi
ppaṭikku
Ippaṭi
mpiye
ruvai pā
tu Ivai
Digital edition of SII 24.118 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
